india_trends.title: Bet early and exit often: How IIMA Ventures creates a healthy investment cycle
india_trends.summary: IIMA Ventures exited Pune-based Unbox Robotics earlier this year when the warehouse automation startup raised $28 million in its Series B round led by ICICI Venture. Other exits include a 60X return on its investment in drone delivery startup Airbound.

india_trends.title: FPI exodus in four months of 2026 surpasses all of last year
india_trends.summary: Foreign investors have sold Indian stocks worth over ₹1.8 lakh crore in 2026. This outflow exceeds 2025's total. A weak rupee, high oil prices, and fewer AI investment chances are driving this trend. This selling is the most in the first four months of any year. South Korea and Taiwan saw more forei

india_trends.title: Sebi fines Axis Trustee Services Rs 10 lakhs
india_trends.summary: Sebi has fined Axis Trustee Services ₹10 lakh. The penalty is for not promptly disclosing a ruling against former REIT executive Aravind Maiya. The National Financial Reporting Authority found Maiya guilty of misconduct. This information was crucial for unitholders and stock exchanges. Axis Trustee'

india_trends.title: Vedanta earns record profit in Q4, plans to reduce debt
india_trends.summary: Vedanta anticipates a strong FY27 driven by record profits. The company plans to significantly reduce debt, invest in expansion, and continue rewarding shareholders. Leverage is projected to reach a new low. Vedanta is also proceeding with its demerger, with four new companies set to list soon. Some

india_trends.title: Bajaj Finance Q4 net rises 22%, AUM crosses Rs 5 lakh crore
india_trends.summary: Bajaj Finance reported a robust consolidated net profit of ₹5,464.6 crore for Q4FY26, a 22% year-on-year increase driven by a 20% rise in net interest income and 22% AUM growth. In a separate announcement, Rajiv Bajaj will step down from the company's board after the annual general meeting on July 3

india_trends.title: Gold Holds Three-Day Decline as Hawkish Fed Flags Inflation Risk
india_trends.summary: Gold held a three-day loss after a divided Federal Reserve kept US interest rates steady and said the war in Iran was clouding the economic outlook.
